title: Pothi Vecha Lyrics Annakodiyum Kodiveeranum  Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: G. V. Prakash Kumar, Prashanthini
Song: Pothi vecha
Lyrics: Arivumathi
Movie: Annakodiyum Kodiveeranum
Music: G.V.Prakash Kumar		 .
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Pothi vecha aasathaan
othukichu pesathaan
sillu vandu paarthudhaan
sirikiradhey ..

Pathivitta aaduthaan
patti vandhu serndhudhaan
pattavali yaavumey inikiradhey..

Anjukuyil koovaadho
nenjukuli aaraadho
natha nandu poley naan
nasungi poreyney

pathukili pesaadho
unkuralaa maaraadho
vaththa thanni meena naan
vandhangi poreyney

Uludhupota puzhudhi pola
vaanam paarthu naan vaaduren
eechangaatu oothapola
nenaikka pogiren .. oh .. o

Kokku meenaanen
oru kadhaiyil naanundhen
oppuku thaayaanen
urugudhu usuru

Aanja kaayi polave
saanja thohu kaayudhey
kuyilu udanji kumuri azhuga
aaru aanadhey ..ye.. ye..

Thandhetti kaadhaaga
valandhuruchu sogam thaan
mansatti odaaga udanjadhu usuru..

Oda meenum paanjadhey
naanal poovum saanjadhey
kozhuthum veyile nadikum azhagu
saaral saaraley ....

Pothi vacha aasathaan
othukichu pesathaan
sillu vandu paarthudhaan
rasikiradhey ..

Pathivitta aaduthaan
patti vandhu serndhudhaan
pattavali yaavumey inikiradhey..

Anjukuyil koovaadho
nenjukuli aaraadho
natha nandu poley naan
nasungi poreyney

pathukili pesaadho
unkuralaa maaraadho
vaththa thanni meena naan
vandhangi poreyney

Uludhupota puzhudhi pola
vaanam paarthu naan vaaduren
eechangaatu oothapola
nenaikka pogiren .. oh .. o English Translation
I tried my best :)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pothi Vecha?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the happiness of togetherness.

In which movie is Pothi Vecha featured?

The song is featured in the movie Annakodiyum Kodiveeranum.

Who are the singers of Pothi Vecha?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar and Prashanthini.

Who composed the music for Pothi Vecha?

The music for the song was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was Pothi Vecha released?

The song was released on February 10, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pothi Vecha, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the joyous moments shared between characters in Annakodiyum Kodiveeranum. The playful lyrics and upbeat melody evoke feelings of happiness and celebration, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The collaboration between GV Prakash Kumar and Prashanthini adds a unique charm to the track. Overall, the song encapsulates the essence of togetherness and joy, resonating with audiences looking for uplifting music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pothi Vecha from the Annakodiyum Kodiveeranum movie is a delightful duet that captures the essence of celebration and joy. With the vibrant vocals of GV Prakash Kumar and Prashanthini, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. The catchy beats and playful lyrics make it a perfect addition to any festive occasion.
stanzaMeanings: The book has brought hope, and it speaks softly, smiling as it comes to see me.
The one who wrote has come close, and the dog has joined in, everything is joyful now.
Does the cuckoo sing or does my heart ache? Like a deer, I feel like I'm fading away.
Does the parrot speak or does your voice change? Like a fish in water, I feel like I'm coming.
Like a river flowing, I look at the sky and sing, thinking of the breeze blowing.
I am like a fish in a story, I am the one who is being embraced, melting away with my breath.
I have spoken sweetly, and I have come to you, my heart is now filled with joy.
I see you, like the rain, in my eyes, it feels like a dream.
Like a ripe fruit, I am falling, the cuckoo is singing, and the river flows beautifully.
The sorrow has grown like a thorn, and it has come out with my breath.
Like a flower, I have bloomed, and the time has come to cry with my heart.
Like a lightning bug, my heart is shining, and it feels like a smile is blooming.
I will run again, and I will bloom like a flower, dancing in the wind, beautiful and free.
The book has brought hope, and it speaks softly, smiling as it comes to see me.
The one who wrote has come close, and the dog has joined in, everything is joyful now.
Does the cuckoo sing or does my heart ache? Like a deer, I feel like I'm fading away.
Does the parrot speak or does your voice change? Like a fish in water, I feel like I'm coming.
